name: Rubik's Cube 3×3 Original (Speed Cube Edition)
description: The original Rubik's Cube — reimagined for smoother, faster solving. The Speed Cube Edition features a redesigned corner-cutting mechanism, vibrant UV-coated stickers, and a tactile matte finish for confident fingertip control. Over 43 quintillion combinations, one solution. For beginners and competitive speedcubers alike, aged 8+.

specifications.value: Redesigned speed mechanism with corner cutting
UV-coated vinyl, fade and scratch resistant
Classic 6-colour (White, Yellow, Red, Orange, Blue, Green)

additionalInfo.value: Rubik's Cube 3×3 Speed Edition, solution guide booklet

reviews.title: Finally learned to solve it!
reviews.reviewText: I've owned several Rubik's Cubes over the years and always gave up. The solution guide included with this one is perfectly written. After two evenings I could solve it consistently. The cube itself turns so smoothly compared to cheaper versions.

reviews.title: Speedcuber approved
reviews.reviewText: I compete in local cube competitions and this is a great entry-level speed cube. Corner cutting is solid and the turns are consistent. For the price it's exceptional — I recommend this to everyone who's starting out.

reviews.title: Best gift for curious kids
reviews.reviewText: Bought this for my 9-year-old who loves puzzles. She watched tutorials online and solved it within a week. Now she challenges every adult who visits. The problem-solving skills this toy builds are incredible.

reviews.title: Great cube, stickers could be better
reviews.reviewText: The mechanism is genuinely better than older Rubik's cubes — smooth and fast. After about 3 months of daily solving the stickers are starting to show slight corner lift. Not a big deal but worth knowing. For the price it's still excellent value.

reviews.title: Addictive and satisfying
reviews.reviewText: I picked this up on a whim and now I can't stop. There's something deeply satisfying about listening to the click-click of each layer turning and working towards the solution. Better built than I expected for the price range.
